name: omenvault
description: RWA-collateralized prediction markets on Mantle with ERC-8004 AI agents

scripts.demo:bots: concurrently --restart-tries 20 --restart-after 3000 --names nansen,allora,trader,oracleA,oracleB,oracleC --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue,red --prefix "[{name}]" "pnpm --filter @omenvault/nansen-watcher start" "pnpm --filter @omenvault/allora-writer start" "pnpm --filter @omenvault/trader start" "ORACLE=A pnpm --filter @omenvault/oracle-swarm start" "ORACLE=B pnpm --filter @omenvault/oracle-swarm start" "ORACLE=C pnpm --filter @omenvault/oracle-swarm start"
scripts.demo: concurrently --restart-tries 20 --restart-after 3000 --names web,nansen,allora,trader,oracleA,oracleB,oracleC --prefix-colors white,cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue,red --prefix "[{name}]" "pnpm --filter @omenvault/web dev" "pnpm --filter @omenvault/nansen-watcher start" "pnpm --filter @omenvault/allora-writer start" "pnpm --filter @omenvault/trader start" "ORACLE=A pnpm --filter @omenvault/oracle-swarm start" "ORACLE=B pnpm --filter @omenvault/oracle-swarm start" "ORACLE=C pnpm --filter @omenvault/oracle-swarm start"
